ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Current rating of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "is_under_2000" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is under 2000 rating */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "federation_id" TEXT /* Federation ID of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "total_prize" REAL /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and regulations of the tournament */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament organizer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tournament */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "is_registration_open" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if registration is currently open */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tournament is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tournament was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tournament information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the round belongs to */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round in the tournament */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the round */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the round */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the round is completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the round information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round the match belongs to */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player in the match */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player in the match */,
  "player1_color" TEXT /* Color of the first player (w for white, b for black) */,
  "player2_color" TEXT /* Color of the second player (w for white, b for black) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (W for win, L for loss, D for draw, H for half point) */,
  "time_control" TEXT /* Time control used in the match */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner of the match */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match is completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the match information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round the result belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the player in the round (W for win, L for loss, D for draw, H for half point) */,
  "points" REAL /* Points earned by the player in the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_results_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each final result */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points earned by the player in the tournament */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the player in the tournament */,
  "prize" TEXT /* Prize won by the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_results_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize category */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the prize category */,
  "prize_amount" REAL /* Amount of the prize */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the prize category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prize category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prize category information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prize_categories_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the prize */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize category */,
  "prize_amount" REAL /* Amount of the prize won */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prize was awarded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prize information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_prizes_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_prizes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_prizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES prize_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player at the end of the round */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the rating information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_participants" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participation was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the participation information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participants_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participants_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time for the match */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the scheduled match is completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_schedules_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_schedules_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_schedules_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points earned */,
  "highest_rating" INTEGER /* Highest rating achieved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistics information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
